description: Javatpoint is a tutorial and educational website covering programming, web technologies, and related technical topics. For this domain, the only verified developer integration surface comes from the provided catalog entry for the Firebase Cloud Messaging API.
summary: javatpoint.com exposes one cataloged HTTP API surface: the Firebase Cloud Messaging API at `https://fcm.googleapis.com/`, documented by an OpenAPI spec and Google discovery document, authenticated by either Google OAuth 2.0 or an API key.
